zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理上行受阻
zh.content:
当前ETH价格围绕1796震荡，整体维持窄幅整理结构，短线在1788均线之上运行，显示多头仍占优势，但动能略有放缓整理中

MACD指标维持正值5.70附近，显示多头动能仍在延续，但缺少信号线确认，RSI未给出使超买超卖判断不充分，短期偏中性偏多

下方关键支撑位于1788均线及1791日内低点，上方阻力集中在1800整数关口与前高1799附近，突破需放量确认为关键分水岭

交易策略上建议保持区间思路，未有效突破1800前以高抛低吸为主，若放量上破可顺势跟多，跌破1788则需防守减仓控制风险为宜

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation structure around 1796, with price action contained between 1791 and 1799. This narrow range reflects a market in equilibrium after recent minor volatility, with neither buyers nor sellers gaining clear control. Holding above the 20-day SMA near 1788.8 maintains a mildly constructive short-term bias, suggesting that the broader structure still leans upward despite the lack of strong momentum.

From an indicator perspective, MACD at 5.70097 signals positive underlying momentum, but the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of a full bullish crossover setup. This reduces reliability of trend acceleration signals in the near term. RSI data is unavailable, which weakens overbought/oversold context. The 20-day SMA continues to act as a key dynamic support, reinforcing the idea that price remains structurally supported unless that level is broken decisively.

Key support is located at 1791, aligned with the recent intraday low, followed by stronger structural support at 1788, where the SMA20 sits. A breakdown below this zone could open downside exposure toward 1775. On the upside, resistance is defined at 1799, with a psychological barrier at 1800, and further extension near 1808–1812. The compression between these levels suggests a volatility expansion phase may be approaching.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound approach until a breakout confirms direction. Long positions near 1788–1791 offer favorable risk-reward with stops below 1785, targeting a rotation back toward 1799–1808. Alternatively, rejection near 1800 could provide short-term scalp opportunities back toward mid-range support. A sustained breakout above 1800 with volume would shift bias more bullish, while a break below 1788 would weaken the current structure significantly.
